hero.tagline: Building stories frame by frame, blending creativity, emotion, and purpose into content designed to connect and inspire.

about.bio: Video Editor & Creative Professional with 4+ years of experience in content creation and post-production. Currently part of the Creative & Production team at **Social Avenue**, creating content that connects brands with their audience.
about.subBio: Blending creativity, strategy, and post-production to create content that captures attention and drives engagement. From short-form social content to brand campaigns, every frame serves a purpose.

capabilities.title: Editing
capabilities.body: Transforming raw footage into compelling visual stories through pacing, structure, and attention to detail. Using DaVinci Resolve to craft content that is engaging, polished, and tailored to each project's goals.

capabilities.title: Color
capabilities.body: Shaping the mood and visual identity of every project through thoughtful color grading. Using DaVinci Resolve to enhance storytelling, establish atmosphere, and create a consistent look across films, commercials, and digital content.

capabilities.title: Motion & Sound
capabilities.body: Crafting visuals and audio that work together to create engaging, polished content. Using DaVinci Resolve for editing, color, and motion graphics, and Ableton Live for sound design, audio cleanup, and music integration.

contact.intro: If you have an idea, a brand to grow, or a story to tell, let's connect. I'm always open to new collaborations, creative challenges, and opportunities to create impactful content.

footer.kicker: Every great project starts with a conversation.
